sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Real Sociedad are showing signs of improvement, remaining unbeaten in their last 4 matches with 2 wins and 2 draws, including a recent 2-1 victory over Sevilla. Athletic Club, on the other hand, have struggled for consistency, managing only 1 win in their last 5 matches, with a draw and 3 losses, including a 0-1 defeat to Getafe. Sociedad's attacking output has been steady, while Athletic have found goals harder to come by.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two encounters between these Basque rivals, the matches have been tight, with a 0-0 draw and a 1-0 win for Athletic Club. Historically, Athletic hold a slight edge in recent head-to-heads with 3 wins in the last 5 matchups against Sociedad's 1 win and 1 draw. Expect another closely contested battle given their competitive history.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Real Sociedad, sitting 17th with 9 points, have struggled offensively (10 goals, 14th in LaLiga) and defensively (14 goals conceded). Athletic Club, in 9th with 14 points, have a more balanced record but also scored only 9 goals this season. Sociedad's high corner count (6.9 per game, 2nd in league) could be a key factor at home.

sections.subtitle: Key Players to Watch
sections.text: For Real Sociedad, Mikel Oyarzabal (4 goals) and Ander Barrenetxea (3 assists) are pivotal in attack, while Athletic Club will rely on Oihan Sancet, who has a strong record against Sociedad with 3 goals in recent head-to-heads. Both teams have no major absences, giving them full strength for this derby.

sections.subtitle: Match Outlook
sections.text: Given Sofascore's prediction (35% home win, 37% draw, 28% away win) and Sociedad's recent form at home, they hold a slight edge. However, Athletic's defensive resilience and historical advantage in this fixture suggest a draw is likely. Expect a low-scoring, tactical game with limited goals.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: At half-time, the score stands at a 1-1 draw between Real Sociedad and Athletic Club at the Reale Arena in San Sebastian. Both teams have shown determination to secure the win in this Basque derby, with goals from Brais Méndez for the home side and Gorka Guruzeta for the visitors late in the first half. The match has been competitive, with Real Sociedad holding a slight edge in possession and creating more clear-cut opportunities. Athletic Club, however, have been resilient and capitalized on their chance to level the score.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance analysis
halftimeSections.text: Real Sociedad have dominated the ball for much of the first half, maintaining control in midfield and making frequent entries into the final third. Their attacking play has been more structured, leading to several promising chances, though they missed a big opportunity to extend their lead. Defensively, they’ve been decent, with a strong showing in aerial duels. Athletic Club, on the other hand, have been more direct in their approach, focusing on quick transitions. While they’ve had fewer entries into dangerous areas, their efficiency in front of goal has kept them in the game. Their defense, anchored by solid clearances, has managed to withstand pressure for the most part.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key players at half-time
halftimeSections.text: For Real Sociedad, Brais Méndez has been the standout performer, not only scoring the opener but also posing a constant threat with his movement and involvement in attack. Mikel Oyarzabal has also contributed creatively, setting up a significant chance. On the Athletic Club side, Gorka Guruzeta’s clinical finishing has been pivotal, ensuring his team remains level. Unai Simón in goal has made crucial interventions to keep the scoreline tight, while Andoni Gorosabel’s assist highlights his importance in the build-up play.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum shifts
halftimeSections.text: The first half saw fluctuating momentum between the two sides. Athletic Club started with intent, pushing forward in the early minutes and creating pressure in the opposition half. However, Real Sociedad soon took control with sustained attacking spells, dominating the middle phase of the half and building dangerous moves. Towards the end of the half, momentum shifted briefly as Athletic Club mounted a response leading to their equalizer. Real Sociedad regained their attacking rhythm in the closing stages, ending the half on the front foot with notable attacking intent.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half expectations
halftimeSections.text: The second half is likely to be an intense battle as both teams push for a winner in this fiercely contested derby. Real Sociedad, with their possession-based approach and home advantage, will aim to capitalize on their attacking opportunities and convert their chances. Athletic Club will look to exploit counter-attacking opportunities, relying on their direct style to catch the hosts off guard. Defensive discipline will be key for both sides, as any lapse could prove costly. Expect tactical adjustments, with Real Sociedad potentially introducing fresh legs to maintain their tempo, while Athletic Club may reinforce their midfield to disrupt the opposition’s rhythm.
